name: kntnt-wp-skills
description: Kntnt's WordPress-skills plugin — mirror a live WordPress site down into a local DDEV copy: `clone` a fresh copy of production, or `pull` to refresh an existing one, driven solely through the Novamira MCP.

plugins.name: kntnt-wp-skills
plugins.description: Mirror a live WordPress site down into a local DDEV copy. Two user-invoked skills over one transfer engine: `clone` creates a fresh local copy of a production site, and `pull` refreshes an existing one incrementally. Both reach production solely through the Novamira MCP — never over SSH.
